description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a sprawling, L-shaped footprint. The exterior features a mix of large glass windows, wood paneling, and stone accents, creating a sleek and contemporary appearance. The property includes a spacious driveway leading to a double garage, a landscaped yard with palm trees, and a rectangular swimming pool at the rear. Multiple skylights are visible on the roof, allowing natural light into the interior spaces. The backyard is designed for leisure, with a large patio area adjacent to the pool and extensive green lawn. The overall design emphasizes open, airy living with strong indoor-outdoor connections.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, wood and stone accents, a double garage, and a backyard pool set in landscaped grounds.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, double garage, main entrance, and landscaped front yard with palm trees.
description_view_1: Rear-side view highlighting the garage, side yard, and the pool area beginning to come into view.
description_view_2: Back view featuring the full swimming pool, large patio, and extensive glass windows opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Side-rear view showing the pool, patio, and a clear view of the flat roof with skylights and the side entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
